title: 《星际穿越主题曲》

scoreTitle: 《星际穿越主题曲》和弦版简谱进度
hint: 和弦版加入低音/和声支撑与尾段分解和弦，重点补足原曲的管风琴式氛围。

unsupported: Source changes from 3/4 to 4/4 near the ending; schema still uses global beatsPerMeasure=3, preserving absolute beat timing from the existing melody version.
Dense stacked notation is thinned to 2-4 playable 21-key C kalimba tones per anchor.
Modern film-score source; publication rights for public distribution should be reviewed before release.
unsureMeasures: m44-m49 triplet arpeggio cells are kept on the existing quantized 0.25 beat grid for validator compatibility.

harmonyReview.method: Added source-like low stack/chord anchors to the existing verified main melody, emphasizing pedal bass and high ostinato for recognizability.
reviewRequired: If a MIDI/MusicXML source becomes available, rebuild the meter change and triplet ending more exactly.

autoAccompaniment.generatedFrom: Doc88 stacked lower row and conservative harmonic anchors
autoAccompaniment.pattern: long organ-like chord anchors plus ending support
autoAccompaniment.restPolicy: no generated fill in explicit source rests before the first lower stack

sourceReview.decision: Updated the melody version by moving the opening ostinato into the higher playable register, and added a V2 chord/accompaniment version from the supplied Doc88 three-page jianpu screenshots.
